antipattern.description: Both `black` and `ruff format` configured; pre-commit runs both.
antipattern.reason: Conflicting fixes possible; doubled run time; cognitive overhead. Pick ruff.
Every `.objects.*` is Any. The strict mode catches nothing in the ORM.

antipattern.description: Bandit at low severity, hundreds of findings, gate disabled.
antipattern.reason: Gate becomes folklore; real findings drown in noise. Run at high severity only.
Developers on other editors bypass the gate; CI catches it last.
Silent overrides; IDE picks the wrong one; rules drift.
